subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Rajput king is associated with the founding of Chittor?
question_hi: चीट्टो के शुद्धिकां के राज्य के सेवानिविच्यां को स्पष्ट करें।
explanation_en: King Meera is associated with the founding of Chittor. Chittor was founded by Queen Meera in the 14th century.
explanation_hi: चीटर को 14वेंद्रींची कृती के सहायता से बने। चीटर के 14वेंद्रींची के सहायता से बने हैं।
